title: Charboa's RAPID HFSM
description: A lightweight and comprehensive Hierarchical Finite State Machine creator. Built for fast iteration and production-ready state machines.

title: Charboa's O.B.A.M.A
description: Object Based Audio Manager Advanced is a complete audio management solution that utilizes gameobjects for deterministic and realistic audio placement. O.B.A.M.A's powerful editor allows you to trim, combine, tweak and even bake audios so you will never have to leave the Unity Editor for designing audio again.
